en: Not to us, O LORD, not to us, but to your name give glory, for the sake of your steadfast love and your faithfulness!
zh: 耶和華啊！不要把榮耀歸給我們，不要歸給我們； 要因你的慈愛和信實把榮耀歸在你的名下。

en: Why should the nations say, "Where is their God?"
zh: 為甚麼容列國的人說： “他們的 神在哪裡呢？”

en: Our God is in the heavens; he does all that he pleases.
zh: 我們的 神在天上； 他喜歡甚麼，就作甚麼。

en: Their idols are silver and gold, the work of human hands.
zh: 列國的偶像是金的、銀的， 是人手所做的。

en: They have mouths, but do not speak; eyes, but do not see.
zh: 它們有口，卻不能說話； 有眼，卻不能看；

en: They have ears, but do not hear; noses, but do not smell.
zh: 有耳，卻不能聽； 有鼻，卻不能聞；

en: They have hands, but do not feel; feet, but do not walk; and they do not make a sound in their throat.
zh: 有手，卻不能摸； 有腳，卻不能行； 也不能用喉嚨發聲。

en: Those who make them become like them; so do all who trust in them.
zh: 做偶像的必和偶像一樣； 凡是倚靠它們的，都必這樣。

en: O Israel, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.
zh: 以色列啊！你們要倚靠耶和華； 他是你們 的幫助、你們 的盾牌。

en: O house of Aaron, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.
zh: 亞倫家啊！你們要倚靠耶和華； 他是你們 的幫助、你們 的盾牌。

en: You who fear the LORD, trust in the LORD! He is their help and their shield.
zh: 敬畏耶和華的啊！你們要倚靠耶和華； 他是你們 的幫助、你們 的盾牌。

en: The LORD has remembered us; he will bless us; he will bless the house of Israel; he will bless the house of Aaron;
zh: 耶和華顧念我們， 必賜福給我們； 他必賜福給以色列家， 賜福給亞倫家。

en: he will bless those who fear the LORD, both the small and the great.
zh: 敬畏耶和華的，無論大小尊卑， 他都必賜福。

en: May the LORD give you increase, you and your children!
zh: 願耶和華使你們增多， 使你們和你們的子孫增多。

en: May you be blessed by the LORD, who made heaven and earth!
zh: 願你們蒙創造天地的耶和華賜福。

en: The heavens are the LORD's heavens, but the earth he has given to the children of man.
zh: 天屬於耶和華， 地，他卻賜給了世人。

en: The dead do not praise the LORD, nor do any who go down into silence.
zh: 死人不能讚美耶和華， 下到陰間的不能讚美他。

en: But we will bless the LORD from this time forth and forevermore. Praise the LORD!
zh: 至於我們，我們要稱頌耶和華， 從現在直到永遠。 你們要讚美耶和華。
